track on a photo or on a slide people's eyes naturally go from top left to bottom right that is how we look at a photo when you look at a photo without even knowing it you go top left to bottom right it's automatically what you do which is to say the top right of a slide right if you're going top left to bottom right that means the opposite corners are the least impacted corners visually we don't
